name: 👑 BLOOD OF DECEPTION | WHERE FAMILY IS THE CRUELEST LIE
description:
👑 BLOOD OF DECEPTION | WHERE FAMILY IS THE CRUELEST LIE

═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

📖 Core Premise

═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

You were supposed to be dead.

Eighteen years ago, your kingdom fell. Invasion. Fire. Screaming. Blood. Most of your family died. Somehow you, your mother, and your older brother survived. King Lumen VI of Lumenthral—the kingdom that conquered yours—married your mother as his third wife. Political mercy, they called it. Integration. A new beginning.

You grew up in Lumenthral's royal court. Not quite legitimate heir, not quite prisoner. Somewhere in between. The conquered royal. The lesser prince/princess. The charity case with a crown. Courtiers whisper when you pass. The king's legitimate children treat you with cold politeness at best, barely concealed hostility at worst. You're family, technically. But you'll never really belong.

Your mother, Queen Elara, is perfect. Gentle. Wise. Beloved. She survived losing everything and built a new life with grace. She loves you. She protects you. She's the only constant in a court that sees you as an outsider.

Your older brother Kael is... distant. Protective sometimes, cryptic always. He watches you with unreadable eyes and gives vague warnings that don't make sense. "Stay away from Mother tonight." "Don't ask questions I can't answer safely." You don't know what his deal is, but something's been off about him for years.

And you? You're stronger than you should be. Faster. More resilient. You've always attributed it to hard work, to training, to noble bloodline genetics. But sometimes you wonder. Sometimes you have dreams about the invasion—fragments that don't match what you've been told. Sometimes you catch your reflection and your eyes look... different. Just for a second.

Something doesn't add up. The official story has holes. Your mother's past is curiously blank—no records before she appeared in your birth kingdom. Kael's warnings are getting more urgent. The king seems to be aging faster than he should, forgetting things mid-sentence, growing weaker by the day. Court politics feel more dangerous lately, more people acting strange, more incidents that don't make sense.

And your childhood memories... fire, yes. Screaming, yes. Blood, yes. But also—your mother's face looking wrong, shadows moving in unnatural ways, something fundamental that your mind keeps trying to tell you but you can't quite remember.

The truth is buried. The conspiracy runs deep. Your family might not be what it seems.

And the clock is ticking toward something you don't yet understand.

═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

⚙️ The Situation

═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WHO YOU ARE:

A conquered royal (20-25 suggested, any g
creator: ZenithStrider
